testsuite.name: Checking of Large format printer functionality

testcase.name: Checking of Large format printer functionality should hover Large Format Printers and check that correct page was opened

testcase.name: Checking of Large format printer functionality should check that filter is working correct for Large format and clear filter

testcase.name: Checking of Large format printer functionality should open Support page from PLP
testcase.classname: should open Support page from PLP

testcase.name: Checking information on Checkout pages should check main info about the order and a buyer

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 50000ms: Expected to find element: `.product-card`, but never found it.

failure.message:
`cy.request()` failed on:
https://epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com/en_GB/products/printers/label-makers/c/labelwriter
The response we received from your web server was:
> 404: Not Found
This was considered a failure because the status code was not `2xx` or `3xx`.
If you do not want status codes to cause failures pass the option: `failOnStatusCode: false`
-----------------------------------------------------------
The request we sent was:
Method: GET URL: https://epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com/en_GB/products/printers/label-makers/c/labelwriter Headers: { "Connection": "keep-alive", "user-agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/96.0.4664.110 Safari/537.36", "accept": "*/*", "cookie": "gpv_prevurl=epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com%2Fen_GB%2Fc%2Flabelwriter; gpv_pn=404; epsonstorefrontRememberMe=bWFyaWEuYm9icm92YSUyQjAzJTQwa2VlbmV0aGljcy5jb206MTY0MjQ5OTEyMTkyNzo0ZWQ0ODEwM2NiOTQxNjgxM2IzYjJkYWE1YjlhMjJlOA; OptanonAlertBoxClosed=2022-01-04T09:45:19.377Z; anonymous-consents=%5B%5D; OptanonConsent=isGpcEnabled=0&datestamp=Tue+Jan+04+2022+11%3A45%3A27+GMT%2B0200+(Eastern+European+Standard+Time)&version=6.21.0&isIABGlobal=false&hosts=&consentId=5b76394b-595f-416c-a2f1-e787348f671f&interactionCount=1&landingPath=NotLandingPage&groups=C0004%3A1%2CC0003%3A1%2CC0002%3A1%2CC0001%3A1&geolocation=UA%3B23&AwaitingReconsent=false; AMCV_C6DD45815AE6DFFD0A495D24%40AdobeOrg=-2121179033%7CMCIDTS%7C18997%7CMCMID%7C31299330352542165872597430877874370784%7CMCAAMLH-1641894317%7C6%7CMCAAMB-1641894317%7CRKhpRz8krg2tLO6pguXWp5olkAcUniQYPHaMWWgdJ3xzPWQmdj0y%7CMCOPTOUT-1641296717s%7CNONE%7CMCSYNCSOP%7C411-19004%7CvVersion%7C5.3.0; mbox=session#5522dd6225d64a05b6dd0cfef250f0d3#1641291388|PC#5522dd6225d64a05b6dd0cfef250f0d3.37_0#1704534318; cookie-notification=NOT_ACCEPTED; s_sq=%5B%5BB%5D%5D; JSESSIONID=Y6-272349bb-6bb8-4906-a8e2-fce4b161e2c1.accstorefront-97474cc55-rtpj5; acceleratorSecureGUID=a26451914094dc29ccfb3d607546fe8a4cfcdc6f; s_cc=true; at_check=true; AMCVS_C6DD45815AE6DFFD0A495D24%40AdobeOrg=1; ROUTE=.accstorefront-97474cc55-rtpj5", "accept-encoding": "gzip, deflate" }
-----------------------------------------------------------
The response we got was:
Status: 404 - Not Found Headers: { "date": "Tue, 04 Jan 2022 09:45:25 GMT", "server": "*", "x-frame-options": "", "cache-control": "no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate", "pragma": "no-cache", "expires": "0", "strict-transport-security": "max-age=31536000 ; includeSubDomains", "x-xss-protection": "1; mode=block", "x-content-type-options": "nosniff", "content-type": "text/html;charset=UTF-8", "content-language": "en-GB", "vary": "User-Agent", "keep-alive": "timeout=5, max=43", "connection": "Keep-Alive", "transfer-encoding": "chunked" } Body: <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en-GB" dir="ltr"> <head> <title> Page Not Found | Epson United Kindom</title>

testsuite.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP

testcase.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP should check that pagination working correct for PLP
testcase.classname: should check that pagination working correct for PLP

testcase.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP should check that sorting by Price is working correct for PLP
testcase.classname: should check that sorting by Price is working correct for PLP

testcase.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP should check that sorting by Name is working correct for PLP
testcase.classname: should check that sorting by Name is working correct for PLP

testcase.name: Testing of Compare functionality should open PLP page, add printers to Compare, hide and delete
testcase.classname: should open PLP page, add printers to Compare, hide and delete

testcase.name: Testing of Compare functionality should have an ability to open product details from Compare block and verify pages
testcase.classname: should have an ability to open product details from Compare block and verify pages

testsuite.name: Checking of Cookies banner correct work

testcase.name: Checking of Cookies banner correct work should click Cookies Info link and check correct page
testcase.classname: should click Cookies Info link and check correct page

testcase.name: Checking of Cookies banner correct work should click Cookies settings, Allow All switches and confirm
testcase.classname: should click Cookies settings, Allow All switches and confirm

testcase.name: Login and buy a printer should login and buy a printer from PLP using credit card
testcase.classname: should login and buy a printer from PLP using credit card

testcase.name: Check Mobile version correct working should change screen resolution, login successful and purchase
testcase.classname: should change screen resolution, login successful and purchase

testcase.name: Check Mobile version correct working should change screen resolution, login and open My Account menu
testcase.classname: should change screen resolution, login and open My Account menu

testsuite.name: Find specific printer, add to cart and perform quantity checking

testcase.name: Find specific printer, add to cart and perform quantity checking should show errors when printers quantity change to incorrect one
testcase.classname: should show errors when printers quantity change to incorrect one

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 50000ms: Expected to find element: `.product-summary__buttons #addToCartButton`, but never found it.

testcase.name: Add several consumables and Accessories to cart should login, add printer, several accessories and purchase
testcase.classname: should login, add printer, several accessories and purchase

testcase.name: Checking Order History Tab should check Sorting on Order History page
testcase.classname: should check Sorting on Order History page

testcase.name: Checking Order History Tab should check Pagination on Order History page
testcase.classname: should check Pagination on Order History page

testcase.name: Checking Order History Tab should open Order Number page and reorder an order
testcase.classname: should open Order Number page and reorder an order

testcase.name: Checking Order History Tab should check Order History "Back" button
testcase.classname: should check Order History "Back" button

testsuite.name: Check that user can go from one website to another one

testcase.name: Check that user can go from one website to another one should select German website, trigger redirect and check correct final page
testcase.classname: should select German website, trigger redirect and check correct final page

testcase.name: Check that user can go from one website to another one should select Belgium website, trigger redirect and check correct final page
testcase.classname: should select Belgium website, trigger redirect and check correct final page

testcase.name: Check that user can go from one website to another one should select Belgium website, trigger redirect and check correct final page
testcase.classname: should select Belgium website, trigger redirect and check correct final page

testcase.name: Checking filter for all printers should check that filters are working correct for Ink Printer
testcase.classname: should check that filters are working correct for Ink Printer

testcase.name: Checking filter for all printers should check that several filters shows correct result for Dot Printer
testcase.classname: should check that several filters shows correct result for Dot Printer

testcase.name: Checking filter for all printers should check that filter is working correct for Laser Printer
testcase.classname: should check that filter is working correct for Laser Printer

testcase.name: Checking filter for all printers should check that filter is working correct for Label Maker Printers
testcase.classname: should check that filter is working correct for Label Maker Printers

testcase.name: Testing of pages relevance by breadcrumbs should hover over InkJet Printers and open random page
testcase.classname: should hover over InkJet Printers and open random page

testcase.name: Testing of pages relevance by breadcrumbs should hover over Laser Printers and open random page
testcase.classname: should hover over Laser Printers and open random page

testcase.name: Testing of pages relevance by breadcrumbs should hover over Dot Matrix Printers and open page
testcase.classname: should hover over Dot Matrix Printers and open page

testcase.name: Testing of pages relevance by breadcrumbs should hover over Label maker Printers and open random page
testcase.classname: should hover over Label maker Printers and open random page

testcase.classname: should search for a product and click each level of breadcrumbs

testsuite.name: User should have an ability to purchase as Guest

testcase.name: User should have an ability to purchase as Guest should open website, add product to Cart and register with existed email
testcase.classname: should open website, add product to Cart and register with existed email

testcase.name: Checking Update Email Tab should check that new Email is saved successfully
testcase.classname: should check that new Email is saved successfully

testcase.name: Checking Update Email Tab should check negative cases for email changing
testcase.classname: should check negative cases for email changing

testsuite.name: Check Learn More page is opens correctly

testcase.name: Check Learn More page is opens correctly should open Learn More page for InkJet printers
testcase.classname: should open Learn More page for InkJet printers

testcase.name: Check Learn More page is opens correctly should open Learn More page for Laser Printers
testcase.classname: should open Learn More page for Laser Printers

testcase.classname: should open Learn More page for Dot Matrix Printers

testcase.name: Check Learn More page is opens correctly should open Learn More page for Label Maker Printers
testcase.classname: should open Learn More page for Label Maker Printers

testsuite.name: Check Support search page works correctly

testcase.name: Check Support search page works correctly should open Support page and perform search by Product name
testcase.classname: should open Support page and perform search by Product name

testcase.name: Check Support search page works correctly should open Support page and perform search by Serial Number
testcase.classname: should open Support page and perform search by Serial Number

testcase.name: Check Support search page works correctly should search and select specific printer from dropdown list
testcase.classname: should search and select specific printer from dropdown list

testcase.name: Check Support search page works correctly should check that Product Info, Standard Warranty and Extended Warranty are displayed
testcase.classname: should check that Product Info, Standard Warranty and Extended Warranty are displayed

testcase.name: Check Support search page works correctly should check Subscription for a Printer in quantity 1
testcase.classname: should check Subscription for a Printer in quantity 1

testcase.classname: should check Subscription for a Printer in quantity 3

testcase.classname: should check main information of a printer

testsuite.name: Open Cart and perform negative cases for Checkout

testcase.name: Open Cart and perform negative cases for Checkout should perform negative tests for all Checkout pages
testcase.classname: should perform negative tests for all Checkout pages

testsuite.name: Checking of all the links for Projectors to have status 200

testcase.name: Checking of all the links for Projectors to have status 200 should have all Projectors links with status 200
testcase.classname: should have all Projectors links with status 200

testsuite.name: Checking of all the links for Shop online pages to have status 200

testcase.name: Checking of all the links for Shop online pages to have status 200 should have all Shop Online links with status 200
testcase.classname: should have all Shop Online links with status 200

testsuite.name: Testing Tab Bar for each product

testcase.name: Testing Tab Bar for each product should open website on a specific PDP to check tabs for Printers
testcase.classname: should open website on a specific PDP to check tabs for Printers

testcase.name: Testing Tab Bar for each product should open website on a specific PDP to check tabs for Options
testcase.classname: should open website on a specific PDP to check tabs for Options

testcase.classname: should open website on a specific accessories PDP to check tabs

testsuite.name: Guest user performs purchase using discounts

testcase.name: Guest user performs purchase using discounts should open website, find product with promotion, add extra voucher and apply
testcase.classname: should open website, find product with promotion, add extra voucher and apply

testcase.name: Guest user performs purchase using discounts should open website, find Promotion printer and add it to Cart

testcase.name: Guest user performs purchase using discounts should open website, add printer to cart and apply Amount based voucher

testcase.name: Guest user performs purchase using discounts should open website, add printer to cart and apply Percentage based voucher
testcase.classname: should open website, add printer to cart and apply Percentage based voucher

testcase.name: Checking Buy Accessories page should check that all inner links are opened correct
testcase.classname: should check that all inner links are opened correct

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 50000ms: Expected to find element: `.product-pricing__stock`, but never found it.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 50000ms: Expected to find element: `.product-pricing__stock`, but never found it. at PdpAssertions.checkThatInStockStatusIsVisible (https://epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\integration\tests\28_buy_accessories_page.spec.js:3119:54) at Context.eval (https://epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\integration\tests\28_buy_accessories_page.spec.js:6094:25)
